title: Looking for an experienced python user
author: Candid-Door-7023
selftext: I have created a near perfect script for an automated AI trader that’ll work on any chart it’s imputed on. I’m looking for somebody who’s willing to an exchange. I will give my model to anybody with proof they’ve worked on successful AI trading projects, know the in’s and out’s of python, have used python to integrate an AI script before and have proof of reputable work with others on trust based interactions. This is a “I scratch your back you scratch mine” situation where we can both have automated wealth. Don’t respond to this, DMs are where you can send me the details needed to get started and where we can discuss the concept before partnership.
